title: Tokenizer Checkpoint Download
description: Downloading and validating NVIDIA Cosmos-Tokenize1 tokenizer model checkpoints from HuggingFace with MD5 integrity verification
activity_flow: ACTION: Build model_map dict (8 tokenizer type keys → HuggingFace repo names)
ACTION: Create checkpoints_dir = Path(args.checkpoint_dir), mkdir parents=True
ACTION: Define download_kwargs (allow_patterns: README.md, model.pt, mean_std.pt, config.json, *.jit)
LOOP: for each tokenizer_type in args.tokenizer_types:
ACTION: Iterate MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP entries matching model_name prefix
NO → print 'does not exist', return False
YES → open file in binary mode, compute hashlib.md5(f.read()).hexdigest()
NO → print 'MD5 checksum does not match', return False
ACTION: All files verified → print success, return True
NO (already valid): skip download, continue loop

key_functions.name: parse_args
args: --tokenizer_types: nargs=*, default=all 8 types, choices=[CV8x8x8-720p, DV8x16x16-720p, CI8x8-360p, CI16x16-360p, CV4x8x8-360p, DI8x8-360p, DI16x16-360p, DV4x8x8-360p]

key_functions.name: get_md5_checksum
key_functions.logic: Iterates MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP for keys starting with model_name. Checks file existence then computes MD5 via hashlib.md5. Returns False on first failure, True if all match.

key_functions.name: main
key_functions.logic: Creates checkpoint dir, loops tokenizer types, calls get_md5_checksum per model, conditionally calls snapshot_download if invalid/missing, finally calls download_guardrail_checkpoints.

data_structures.MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP: dict[str, str] — 27 entries mapping 'ModelName/filename' → md5hex for 8 tokenizer model families (autoencoder.jit, decoder.jit, encoder.jit, mean_std.pt)
data_structures.model_map: dict[str, str] — 8 entries mapping CLI type shorthand → HuggingFace repo folder name (e.g. 'CV8x8x8-720p' → 'Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p')

decision_points: get_md5_checksum: file exists? (missing → False / download triggered)
get_md5_checksum: computed MD5 matches expected? (mismatch → False / download triggered)
main loop: get_md5_checksum returns False → trigger snapshot_download; True → skip
external_dependencies: huggingface_hub.snapshot_download — fetches model files from HuggingFace Hub
scripts.download_guardrail_checkpoints.download_guardrail_checkpoints — called after all tokenizer downloads complete
important_notes: MD5 verification acts as a cache guard: already-valid checkpoints skip re-download. Each model has up to 4 artifacts (autoencoder.jit, decoder.jit, encoder.jit, mean_std.pt). Guardrail checkpoints are always downloaded at the end regardless of tokenizer selection. snapshot_download uses local_dir_use_symlinks=False for portable copies.
